name: Simulate Reads
description: Generate dummy sequencing files for the samples in an order

outputs.name: simulated_reads
outputs.description: Generated FASTQ files linked back to the sample Read records

outputs.name: simulation_summary
outputs.description: Run-level summary of generated dummy reads

simulationMode.title: Simulation Source
simulationMode.description: Use synthetic generation, replay facility template FASTQ pairs, or auto-select templates when available.

mode.title: Simulation Mode
mode.description: Choose the dummy read profile to generate for the selected samples.

readCount.title: Read Count
readCount.description: Number of reads per sample. For long-read mode this is the number of long reads.

readLength.title: Read Length
readLength.description: Read length for short-read modes, or target average length for long-read mode.

qualityProfile.title: Quality Profile
qualityProfile.description: Synthetic-only quality/error preset for generated reads.

insertMean.title: Insert Mean
insertMean.description: Synthetic paired-end mean insert size in bases.

insertStdDev.title: Insert Std Dev
insertStdDev.description: Synthetic paired-end insert size standard deviation in bases.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Optional seed to make synthetic output and template selection reproducible across runs.

replaceExisting.title: Replace Existing Reads
replaceExisting.description: Delete existing linked read files and replace them with the simulated outputs.

templateDir.title: Template Directory
templateDir.description: Admin setting only. Optional absolute or data-base-path-relative directory containing template FASTQ pairs.
